pricing.title: More time for teaching, less admin work
pricing.subtitle: Simple4U automates scheduling, lesson packages, and finances. Start with 14 days of Pro free — no card required.

pro_plan.name: Simple4U Pro
pro_plan.microcopy: No card required to start. Cancel anytime.
features: Telegram integration for parents and students
SVS tax estimates and finance analytics

pricing.stripe_note: Secure checkout via Stripe. Cancel in one click.
pricing.tax_required: Set your tax regime in Account first — checkout is unavailable until then.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How does the free trial work?
faq.a1: You get full Pro access for 14 days at no charge. No card is required to start. After the trial you can subscribe or stay on Free.
faq.a2: All payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI-DSS Level 1 certified provider. We never store your card details.
faq.a3: Yes — cancel in one click from your account. Pro access remains until the end of the paid period.
